execution_recommendation.reason: 20+ atomic tasks, ~7.5 dev days, cross-repo work (faigate + 2 metadata repos), schema migration

tasks.title: Mark kilocode entry as expired in private metadata catalog
tasks.description: Add expires_at: 2026-04-26 and tier_status: expired to kilocode entry. Drop recommended_model so it's not auto-selected. Pre-bump (uses v1.1 fields ahead of schema bump).
acceptanceCriteria: fusionaize-metadata/providers/catalog.v1.json kilocode entry has expires_at and tier_status
JSON validates against current schema (additive fields ignored)
Commit on main with message 'chore(catalog): mark kilo GLM-5 free as expired'

tasks.title: Audit openrouter-fallback entry against current OpenRouter pricing
tasks.description: Verify aliases, pricing, and source URL for openrouter-fallback. Update last_reviewed and pricing.refreshed_at.
acceptanceCriteria: openrouter-fallback aliases match current OpenRouter docs

tasks.title: Create fusionaize-metadata-public repo on GitHub
tasks.description: Create new public repo in fusionAIze org. Apache-2.0 license. Empty initial commit with README pointing to private repo for product overlays.
acceptanceCriteria: README explains scope (raw catalog only, no overlays)

tasks.title: Move providers/catalog.v1.json + schemas/ to public repo
tasks.description: Migrate generic provider catalog and JSON schemas to fusionaize-metadata-public. Keep products/ in private. Add cross-references in both READMEs.
acceptanceCriteria: providers/ and schemas/ live in public repo
Both READMEs explain split + how to consume
CI in both repos still passes

tasks.title: Document fine-grained PAT setup for private metadata access
tasks.description: Write docs/CATALOG-AUTH.md showing how Pro users create a repo-scoped read-only PAT and configure FAIGATE_METADATA_TOKEN.

tasks.title: Bump catalog schema to v1.1 with expires_at and tier_status
tasks.description: Additive fields only. Old faigate ignores them. Update JSON schema in public repo. Document fields.

tasks.title: Implement MetadataCatalogSync class
tasks.description: New class in faigate/metadata_catalog_sync.py. HTTPS GET with If-None-Match. Returns FetchResult(status=fresh|notmodified|error, payload, etag, source).
acceptanceCriteria: Network errors raise SyncError, never crash

tasks.title: Implement filesystem cache with ETag and lock file
tasks.description: Cache module that reads/writes ~/.cache/faigate/metadata/{tier}/catalog.v1.json + .etag. fcntl-based lock for daemon/CLI race safety.
acceptanceCriteria: CatalogCache.save(tier, payload, etag) atomic via temp+rename

tasks.title: Implement resolution chain: private → public → bundled
tasks.description: CatalogResolver wraps Sync + Cache. Tries private if token set, falls back to public, falls back to bundled default_catalog.json. Logs source decision.
acceptanceCriteria: Falls back through tiers on error
Last-known-good cache used if all remotes fail

tasks.title: Validate remote payload against JSON schema before swap-in
tasks.description: Use jsonschema lib (already a dep). Reject invalid payloads, keep current cache, raise alert via build_catalog_alerts.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: corrupted remote payload → cache untouched

tasks.title: Wire CatalogResolver into provider_catalog.py loader
tasks.description: _resolve_catalog_path() in provider_catalog.py currently checks env vars + bundled. Add CatalogResolver between env-var and bundled tiers. Existing FAIGATE_PROVIDER_METADATA_DIR override wins.
acceptanceCriteria: Local FAIGATE_PROVIDER_METADATA_DIR still wins (dev workflow unchanged)

tasks.title: Add `faigate models update` CLI command group
tasks.description: Click command in faigate/cli.py. Subcommands: update (force), update --check, update --diff, status.
acceptanceCriteria: faigate models update forces refresh, prints diff
faigate models status shows source, etag, age

tasks.title: Hook 24h daemon tick into background scheduler
tasks.description: Reuse pattern from quota_poller.py. Configurable interval via metadata.refresh_interval_hours. Backoff on errors (5min, 15min, 1h, capped).
acceptanceCriteria: Errors don't crash worker; backoff applied
Telemetry: count successful/failed refreshes per day

tasks.title: Surface sync alerts via existing build_catalog_alerts
tasks.description: Stale > 7d → warning. Schema invalid → error. Auth failure → warning. Surface in /admin/catalog/alerts and dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing alert UI renders new types

tasks.title: Add Anthropic claude-opus-4-7 + claude-haiku-4-5 entries
tasks.description: New entries with current pricing from anthropic.com/pricing. Bump anthropic.recommended_model to claude-opus-4-7. Aliases 'anthropic:opus' point to 4-7.

tasks.title: Add OpenAI gpt-5.5 reasoning-tier entries
tasks.description: Three entries: gpt-5.5-low, gpt-5.5-medium, gpt-5.5-high. Different pricing per reasoning tier per OpenAI docs. Confirm structure with provider.
acceptanceCriteria: Three distinct entries with separate pricing
Aliases include both versioned and tier-only forms
Source URL points to OpenAI pricing page

tasks.title: Add DeepSeek v4 entries from api-docs.deepseek.com
tasks.description: Add deepseek-v4 chat/reasoner entries. Verify pricing rates and context window per docs. Mark deepseek-v3 entries as superseded if applicable.
acceptanceCriteria: v3 entries either retained as alias or marked tier_status: deprecated

tasks.title: Integration test: end-to-end catalog refresh with mock HTTP
tasks.description: respx-based test. Simulate 200 → 304 → 200 with diff. Assert cache, ETag, alerts.
acceptanceCriteria: Asserts diff alerts emitted on real change

tasks.title: Test fallback chain private → public → bundled
tasks.description: Force each tier to fail in turn. Assert correct source ends up in resolution.
acceptanceCriteria: Source field accurately reflects actual tier used

tasks.title: Secrets-not-logged test (PAT scrubber)
tasks.description: Capture all log records during a sync; assert token never appears.
acceptanceCriteria: Token not in any log message

tasks.title: Update faigate README + add docs/CATALOG-UPDATER.md
tasks.description: Document the new sync flow, env vars, CLI commands, troubleshooting (stale cache, auth, fallback).

roadmap.title: cosign/GPG signing for catalog payloads (MITM defense)
roadmap.rationale: TLS+ETag is sufficient for v1; signing is real defense-in-depth

roadmap.title: Mirror catalog to jsdelivr / unpkg / S3 for redundancy
Auto-PR bot watching vendor docs for pricing changes
roadmap.rationale: Closes the human-in-the-loop gap; turns 'we need to update' into review-only flow

roadmap.title: Schema v2 with capability matrix per model
roadmap.rationale: vision/audio/tools/json-mode flags per model — enables smarter routing

roadmap.title: Outcarve Gate Bar into its own repo/package track
roadmap.rationale: Gate Bar is a useful helper prototype, but keeping the gateway product clean argues for a separate repo and release/cask lifecycle.
